web.title: CT Abdomen and Pelvis
web.description: CT abdomen/pelvis combo (CPT codes 74176, 74177, 74178) is the better study when the indication(s) include both the abdomen AND pelvis.

web.title: Computed Tomography (CT or CAT) Scan of the Abdomen
web.description: A CT scan of the abdomen may be performed to assess the abdomen and its organs for tumors and other lesions, injuries, intra-abdominal bleeding, infections.
